creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> By the way, I have tried adding https://github.com/emaste/freebsd/commit/930a7c2ac67e1e8e511aa1d0a31a16c632060ebb into my patch, but it did not work. If I recall correctly, I have got an error 2 from execve or execvpe.

I think this patch is desirable; maybe there is something else going wrong there.
